# Best & Less Blinds & Shutters

> Custom-made, affordable blinds, plantation shutters and curtains for homes, offices and apartments across Sydney, NSW. Free in-home consultation, measure and quote, 7 days a week.

Best & Less Blinds & Shutters is a Sydney (Blacktown) window-furnishing specialist. Every product is made to measure and professionally installed, backed by a Guarantee Certificate and 100% customer-satisfaction promise. We combine real craftsmanship with modern technology, and give honest advice within your budget. Made-to-measure curtains are a current focus, alongside shutters, blinds, outdoor systems and flyscreens.

- Phone: +61 401 337 700
- Email: bestandlessblinds@gmail.com
- Address: Suite 12 / 16 Main Street, Blacktown 2148 NSW
- Service area: Sydney, NSW (homes, offices and apartments)
- Availability: Free in-home consultation & measure, 7 days a week (showroom by appointment)

## Main pages
- [Home](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/): Overview of our products and services.
- [Curtains](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/curtains/): Made-to-measure curtains — sheer, block-out, S-fold and pinch-pleat.
- [Products & Services](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/our-services/): The full range of curtains, shutters, blinds, outdoor systems and flyscreens.
- [About Us](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/about-us/): Who we are and our approach to honest, quality window furnishings.
- [Contact](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/contacts/): Book a free consultation and quote.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/privacy-policy/)

## Products & services
- [Curtains](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/curtain-king/): Sheer, block-out, S-fold and pinch-pleat made-to-measure curtains.
- [Glamshades Curtains](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/glamshades-curtains/): A cross between curtains and blinds in soft Korean fabric.
- [Shutters](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/shutters/): Timber and PVC plantation shutters.
- [PVC Shutters](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/pvc-shutters/): Waterproof, termite-proof shutters for wet areas.
- [Basswood Shutters](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/basswood-shutters/): Timber plantation shutters in paint or stained finishes.
- [Roller Blinds](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/single-roller-blinds/): Light-filtering, block-out and screen fabrics.
- [Double Roller Blinds](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/double-roller-blinds/): A block-out and a screen blind on one bracket.
- [Motorised Roller Blinds](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/motorized-roller-blinds/): Remote, app and voice control (Somfy, Alpha, Jai).
- [Vertical Blinds](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/vertical-blinds/): Versatile blinds for large windows and sliding doors.
- [Venetian Blinds](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/venetian-blinds/): Aluminium, PVC and timber slats with single-cord operation.
- [Combi (Zebra) Blinds](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/combi-blinds/): Day-and-night blinds with alternating sheer and solid bands.
- [Panel Glides](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/panel-glides/): Wide sliding panels for large doors.
- [Blinds (overview)](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/blinds/): The full made-to-measure blinds range.
- [Outdoor](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/outdoor/): Outdoor blinds and awnings — straight drop, deep channel, EZip and more.
- [Flyscreens & Doors](https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/services/flyscreens-doors/): Window flyscreens and sliding/hinged screen doors.

## Notes
- All products are custom-made to measure and professionally installed across Sydney.
- We offer a free in-home consultation, measure and quote — we bring fabric and product samples to you.
- The full sitemap is at https://www.bestandlessblinds.com.au/sitemap.xml
